Global-Attributes/data-*.name: data-*
Global-Attributes/data-*.description: Thedata-*global attributesform a class of attributes calledcustom data attributes, that allow proprietary information to be exchanged between theHTMLand itsDOMrepresentation by scripts.

info.excerpt: Thedata-*global attributesform a class of attributes calledcustom data attributes, that allow proprietary information to be exchanged between theHTMLand itsDOMrepresentation by scripts.

Global-Attributes/dir.name: dir
Global-Attributes/dir.description: Thedirglobal attributeis anenumeratedattribute that indicates the directionality of the element's text.

info.excerpt: Thedirglobal attributeis anenumeratedattribute that indicates the directionality of the element's text.

Global-Attributes/draggable.name: draggable
Global-Attributes/draggable.description: Thedraggableglobal attributeis anenumeratedattribute that indicates whether the element can be dragged, either with native browser behavior or theHTML Drag and Drop API.

info.excerpt: Thedraggableglobal attributeis anenumeratedattribute that indicates whether the element can be dragged, either with native browser behavior or theHTML Drag and Drop API.
